creator: amutu@amutu.com
text:
Created attachment 183193
ip4r-2.2.patch

update ip4r to 2.2:
1.pgFoundry is not maintained,development of ip4r now move to github:https://github.com/RhodiumToad/ip4r
2.update SORBS patch to 2.2,the old 2.x patch do not work for 2.2.
3.change do-install to default behaviour,because now the extension framework can install everything correctly.
